arco.title: ARCO Requests

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect the external services that power the unified inbox and the AI clinical assistant. Each clinic has its own credentials — one WhatsApp number, one inbound email.
integrations.twilioDesc: Via Twilio Conversations. Patients message a single clinic number and the unified inbox routes it to the staff.
integrations.twilioSidHint: Your Twilio account identifier (starts with AC…)
integrations.twilioTokenHint: Keep it private — never share it in chats or screenshots.
integrations.emailDesc: Via Postmark Inbound Parse. The clinic receives email at a dedicated address and it appears as threads in the inbox.
integrations.aiDesc: Anthropic Claude powers the clinical assistant, audio-to-SOAP and X-ray analysis. Configured by the administrator at the platform level.
integrations.aiNotePrefix: This integration is platform-level, not per clinic. To enable it add
integrations.aiNoteSuffix: to the project env vars and redeploy.
integrations.sttDesc: OpenAI Whisper transcribes audio to text for the assistant's voice input and to create SOAP notes automatically from consultation recordings.
integrations.sttNote: While it is not configured, audio-to-SOAP will return a mock and voice input will be disabled.

client.gcalConnectErrorToast: Error connecting Google Calendar — check your credentials
client.cfdiSavedToast: ✅ Tax details configured — you can now issue CFDIs
client.pageSubtitle: Customize your clinic, profile and integrations
client.timezoneHelp: Affects all visible times: schedule, appointments, reminders. After saving, reload the page.
client.mapsLinkHelp: Paste the Google Maps link; the lab will use it to pick up the product at your clinic.
client.cluesHelp: Unique Health Facility Code (CLUES). Required for official NOM-024 reports.
client.descriptionPlaceholder: E.g.: Dental clinic specialized in orthodontics and implants in Mérida
client.publicClinicDesc: You appear in the /clinicas directory and receive online bookings
client.privateClinicDesc: Only your team has access. You don't appear in the public directory.
client.servicesSubtitle: Assign the services each professional offers. These will appear on the booking page for patients to choose from.
client.noServicesAssigned: No services assigned — add at least one
client.cfdiSubtitle: Set up your RFC to issue electronic invoices valid before the SAT
client.cfdiPoweredByBody: — Your RFC is the issuer. Every invoice you generate is automatically stamped with the SAT. The patient can download XML and PDF.
client.rfcHelp: RFC of the clinic or the doctor, depending on who invoices
client.razonSocialPlaceholder: Exact name as it appears with the SAT
client.razonSocialHelp: Must match your Tax Status Certificate exactly
client.cfdiNoteBody: To stamp invoices you also need to upload your Digital Seal Certificate (CSD) in the Facturapi dashboard. This is a SAT requirement and cannot be done here for security reasons.
client.aiHowItWorksBody: Each query with the assistant uses approximately 800 tokens. The limit renews automatically on the first day of each month. It uses Claude Haiku — Anthropic's most efficient model.
client.gcalConnectedDesc: Every new appointment scheduled for you will automatically appear in your Google Calendar with a reminder 24h in advance.
client.gcalConnectDesc: Connect your Google Calendar so every appointment scheduled for you appears automatically with reminders.
client.whatsappDesc: Set up the WhatsApp Cloud API to send automatic appointment reminders to patients.

signature.title: FIEL/SAT electronic signature
signature.intro: Upload your SAT e.firma (.cer + .key + password) to digitally sign prescriptions and clinical notes with legal validity under the LFEA.
signature.securityNote: The password is NOT stored in MediFlow. The .key is encrypted with AES-256-GCM using a master key that lives only in Vercel environment variables. You will be asked for the password each time you sign a document.

team.emailHint: The account is created instantly. A temporary password is shown to share with the doctor.
team.servicesHint: Press Enter or comma to add each service
team.especialidadOficialPlaceholder: e.g. Dentistry, Pediatrics — formal text for prescriptions
team.colorHint: This is how this doctor's appointments will look on the calendar
team.resetPasswordHint: Resetting the password generates a new temporary password. The current one stops working.
team.requiredFields: First name, last name and email are required
team.cannotResetSuperAdmin: Cannot reset the password of a SUPER_ADMIN
team.resetPasswordConfirmDesc: A new temporary password is generated. The current one stops working instantly. You will need to deliver it to the user through a secure channel — it is shown only once.
team.deleteConfirmDesc: If they have appointments or records, they will be deactivated instead of deleted.
team.title: Medical team
team.bannerResetDesc: Share this password with the user through a secure channel. The previous one no longer works. It is shown only once — if you lose it, you must reset it again.
team.bannerCreateDesc: Share this password with the doctor. They can change it in Settings → Security.

permissions.useRoleDefaultHint: When enabled, this user inherits the default permissions of their role. Uncheck it to customize permission by permission.

orderDetail.mpNotReady: The laboratory hasn't finished setting up MercadoPago yet. Message them to arrange payment.

costs.title: Costs & Margin
costs.subtitle: Rent + operating costs vs. revenue generated, per chair
costs.noChairs: No active chairs in the clinic.
costs.footerNote: Revenue = SUM(invoice.paid) where invoice.appointment.resourceId matches and appointment.startsAt falls within the month. Red margin = loss that month; consider raising prices, reassigning patients, or renegotiating rent.
costs.fieldNotesPlaceholder: E.g. Rent shared with another clinic, contract expires in Oct…

doctors.title: Doctors
doctors.subtitle: Performance, revenue generated, and patient satisfaction
doctors.noDataDesc: There are no active doctors with appointments in this period.
doctors.footerNote: Note: Revenue = paid invoices associated with the doctor's appointments. Satisfaction = average PatientSatisfaction (NPS 1-5). Average time = AppointmentTimeline.totalConsultMin. Payroll exports a CSV with the visible data. A professional payroll PDF will arrive in the next push.

journeyClient.title: Patient Journey
journeyClient.subtitle: Appointment flow stage by stage, drop-offs and bottleneck
journeyClient.noAppointments: No appointments in the selected range.
journeyClient.timingNote: Times are calculated from AppointmentTimeline (timestamps captured at each status transition). Stages with sample=0 indicate that transition is not being recorded for appointments in the range — confirm the CHECKED_IN → IN_CHAIR → IN_PROGRESS → COMPLETED → CHECKED_OUT flow is used day to day.

noShows.title: No-shows
noShows.subtitle: Historical analysis + AI prediction for upcoming appointments
noShows.aiQuestion: Identify the most anomalous no-show pattern and suggest 1-2 actions (e.g. extra reminders, deposit, slot changes).
noShows.aiError: Could not generate the AI insight
noShows.topPatientsTitle: Patients with the most no-shows in range

occupancy.title: Occupancy

occupancy.leastUsedHint: only receives {pct}% of appointments. Consider reassigning patients or reducing that chair's schedule.

waitingRoom.subtitle: Wait times by hour of day + real-time alerts
waitingRoom.emptyHint: For wait times to appear, check the patient in on arrival (status = CHECKED_IN) and then mark "In chair" (IN_CHAIR) when they are taken back. The time between the two is the wait.
waitingRoom.heatmapTitle: Average wait time (min) by day and hour
waitingRoom.heatmapCaption: Color scaled proportionally to the threshold ({threshold} min). Hover shows exact minutes. Only cells with data appear.

reports.pageSubtitle: Last 6 months · Revenue, patient, and appointment metrics

efficiencyGauge.msgGood: Good pace, there's room to optimize

client.errorSchemaNotMigrated: Schema not migrated. Apply the inbox migration.

client.noMessagesYet: No messages in this thread yet.
client.placeholderInternalNote: Write an internal note (the patient won't see it)…

whatsapp.subtitle: Automated reminders and patient messaging
whatsapp.disconnectConfirmDesc: Automated reminders will be disabled. You can reconnect at any time.
whatsapp.howItWorksSub: Connection with the Meta WhatsApp Business Cloud API
whatsapp.step1Title: Create a Meta for Developers account
whatsapp.step1Desc: You need a Facebook Business account and to set up the WhatsApp Cloud API.
whatsapp.step2Title: Get your Phone Number ID and Access Token
whatsapp.step2Desc: In your Meta app, go to WhatsApp → Configuration and copy both values.
whatsapp.step3Desc: Paste the values below and MediFlow will send automated reminders.
whatsapp.requirementsBody: A dedicated phone number for WhatsApp Business (it cannot be your personal number if you already use it). Meta grants 1,000 free conversations per month.
whatsapp.phoneIdHint: Meta → Your app → WhatsApp → Configuration → Phone Number ID
whatsapp.accessTokenHint: Meta → Your app → WhatsApp → Configuration → Temporary Access Token
whatsapp.tokenNote: The temporary Access Token expires in 24h. For production, generate a permanent token by following Meta's guide.
whatsapp.whenToSendSub: Automatic when an appointment is created
whatsapp.howSentBodyBefore: Reminders are sent automatically when you schedule an appointment. You can also send one manually from the
whatsapp.howSentBodyAfter: by clicking the WhatsApp icon next to each appointment.

chat.labEmptyHint: Open the chat from a laboratory's profile.
chat.supplierEmptyHint: Open the chat from a supplier's profile.
chat.noConversations: You don't have any conversations yet.
chat.noMessagesWriteFirst: No messages. Write the first one.
chat.sendFailed: The message could not be sent.
